seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon.
new_constraint: The email should be written in a casual tone, using colloquial language and slang.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon. The email should be written in a casual tone, using colloquial language and slang.
response:
Subject: 🎉 Vacation Approved! Time to chill.

Hey [Employee Name],

Good news: I've got your vacation request all locked in. You're good to go!

Just a quick note to keep things smooth: please make sure to wrap up any pending tasks or hand off your current projects before you head out. Let me know who's covering the team while you're away so we don't get left hanging.

Enjoy your time off! Take a breather, see some sun, and come back refreshed. We'll be here waiting when you're back.

Cheers,

[Your Name]
